message:
Fix build error, nil pointer dereferences, signal handler leaks, and silent data loss

- Fix variable shadowing in diff.go that prevented compilation (res reused
  for both SessionResolution and DiffResult)
- Add nil guards for cfg.GetProjectDir in send.go (runKill,
  generateKillSummary, checkCassDuplicates) to prevent panics
- Add defer signal.Stop() to 7 CLI commands (session, watch, activity,
  monitor, health, assign, serve) to prevent goroutine/handler leaks
- Add slog.Warn logging in history storage for silently skipped entries
  during Prune, PruneByTime, ExportTo, ImportFrom, and ReadRecent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -275,6 +275,7 @@ func runHealthWatch(session string) error {
 	// Set up signal handling for clean exit
 	sigChan := make(chan os.Signal, 1)
 	signal.Notify(sigChan, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
+	defer signal.Stop(sigChan)
 
 	ticker := time.NewTicker(time.Duration(healthInterval) * time.Second)
 	defer ticker.Stop()
